creator: Roger@henoc.com
text:
I have CVSuped as well :

FreeBSD JSBach.henoc.qc.ca 3.1-STABLE FreeBSD 3.1-STABLE #0: Sun Apr 25
20:01:18 EDT 1999    
root@JSBach.henoc.qc.ca:/usr/src/sys/compile/JSBach  i386  

and my printer ceased to funtion.

Made all new devices (cd /dev ; ./MAKEDEV all ), in order to try fixing
it.
My printer is an HP OffiJet 635 Color.
